reason: Owner correctly challenged that the previous summary sounded too complete. This artifact records the corrected truth state: the whole Paradise platform is not complete.

correction.previousToneIssue: The prior handoff focused on the latest artifact push and could be read as if most 3A66/3A67 work was finished.
correction.actualMeaning: Only a limited verification/artifact update was completed and pushed. Many requested systems remain source-only, partially implemented, or blocked by owner-authenticated browser/live Discord access.

safeToSay: Some test-lab and smoke checks are live verified.
Some dashboard logged-out/basic checks are verified.
Several artifacts were updated and pushed.
notSafeToSay: The complete Paradise platform is done.
All Chrome-visible channels were fully audited.
All dashboard owner-save/CSRF actions were verified.
All source-only systems are live and tested.

remainingCriticalWork: Full Chrome channel-history/pinned-message audit if browser access remains stable.
Turn source-only help/staff guide/panel systems into live Discord verified installs.
Run main server backups/previews again before any destructive rebuild.
Wait for exact typed confirmation before real server rebuilds.
